headline: Full stack software engineer and DevOps at Qanta Media
about:
I am a versatile software engineer with strong expertise in full-stack web and mobile development, combined with a solid background in DevOps, cloud infrastructure, and automation. I specialize in designing, building, and deploying scalable digital solutions, integrating modern frontend frameworks, robust backend systems, and cloud-native infrastructure. My experience includes frontend development with React, Next.js, React Native, Vite, TailwindCSS, and i18n integrations, creating responsive, multilingual, and high-performance user experiences with clean navigation logic, animations (GSAP, Lenis), and mobile-first optimizations. On the backend side, I have worked extensively with Strapi CMS (REST & GraphQL APIs), Node.js, and PostgreSQL with PostGIS for geodata, designing modular APIs, implementing authentication and authorization, and optimizing data models for performance and scalability.

In the DevOps and cloud infrastructure domain, I am proficient with Docker, Kubernetes (AKS, DigitalOcean), CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, Infrastructure-as-Code using Ansible, and monitoring solutions such as InfluxDB, Telegraf, and Grafana. I manage deployments across Azure and DigitalOcean, including DNS, SSL, S3-compatible storage, and container registries. I also have strong system administration skills with Linux servers, FreeIPA DNS, automation scripts, and environment management for staging and production, with a focus on performance monitoring, troubleshooting, and cost optimization.

I am adept at cross-functional collaboration, translating client needs into technical solutions and delivering multilingual websites, mobile apps, and cloud platforms for diverse industries such as real estate, engineering, environmental projects, and e-commerce. I combine a full-stack mindset with DevOps practices to deliver end-to-end solutions, from coding the UI and APIs to deploying, securing, and maintaining infrastructure in production. My approach balances technical excellence, scalability, and business value, ensuring sustainable digital products that solve real problems.

Built and optimized a multi-service workers mangement platform for a massive tech and electronics company, boosting performance by 50%. Enhanced databases with indexing and query optimization, refactored code, and integrated third-party APIs.

about:
I'm a backend tech lead with a strong focus on building scalable, reliable systems that support complex business flows. I specialize in architecting backend solutions for platforms that require performance, security, and flexibility—often involving multi-tenant environments, financial transactions, and real-time integrations.

I enjoy defining clear technical standards, mentoring engineers, and collaborating across teams to deliver solutions that are production-ready and maintainable long-term. My approach balances technical depth with practical delivery, always aligning with product goals and user experience.

headline: Empresário
about: Profissional com anos de experiência em desenvolvimento de software, aliado a expertise em tráfego pago e estratégias comerciais. Como sócio da SN Resina, aplico minha visão estratégica para unir tecnologia, marketing e negócios, liderando o crescimento da marca e a expansão do nosso braço educacional, a SN Academy.
current_title: Sócio & Head de Inovação e Estratégia

experience.title: Sócio & Head de Inovação e Estratégia
experience.description:
Na SN Resina, lidero a expansão de uma marca especializada em eternização de flores e peças personalizadas em resina epóxi, unindo tecnologia, design e inovação. Como sócio, atuo diretamente na definição da visão estratégica, no fortalecimento da marca e na condução das frentes de comercial, marketing e tecnologia, garantindo crescimento sustentável e escalabilidade do negócio.

Além da operação, também sou responsável pela SN Academy, braço educacional da empresa, onde capacitamos artesãs e empreendedores para ingressarem em um mercado em constante expansão, transformando conhecimento em oportunidades reais de negócio.

Nosso propósito é claro: transformar memórias em arte duradoura e formar profissionais para o futuro da eternização de flores.

experience.title: Desenvolvedor
experience.description:
Atuando como desenvolvedor em uma empresa que entrega Autoestima para nossas assinantes através de uma box de beleza personalizada.

Utilizamos um questionário onde tiramos bastante informações sobre a assinante, para que nosso algoritmo possa realizar a melhor recomendação de produtos baseado nas respostas.

Também temos uma plataforma para nossas marcas parceiras saberem como seus produtos estão sendo avaliados através de feedbacks feitos pelas próprias assinantes.

Estamos em desenvolvimento com uma plataforma chamada UAUTeam, onde teremos um espaço bem bacana para nossas parceiras e também possibilidade de alguém se cadastrar para se tornar uma!

Temos diversos outros projetos também, em que outros times e áreas atuam.

Tecnologias utilizadas: ReactJS (Javascript e Typescript), Flutter, Java, Nodejs, Python.

Passarela Calçados: participação na evolução do backend do sistema da empresa, contribuindo para a estabilidade e escalabilidade da operação de e-commerce.

headline: Software Developer at Leadgogo
about:
Passionate software developer with 4+ years of experience. Within this journey I have worn many hats with roles that go
from manual QA, automated testing, native mobile development (Java, Kotlin), cross-platform mobile development (React Native, Flutter),
back end, front end, mentor, consultant, team lead and so on. These mixed challenges throughout my career had helped me to develop a broader awareness and attention to details on whatever channel I'm working on.
 
Committed to the idea that we must make our best shot when getting things done, no matter how simple it could be, always having in mind priorities and being practical.

Learn, apply, fail, fix, repeat! A simple cycle that will make you a better developer and anything else you want to be!

headline: Typescript | ReactJs & Angular 2+ | Node & Express Software Developer
about:
Enthusiastic software developer with a strong problem solving aptitude and a relentless drive for learning, with over four years of hands on experience in Full-Stack web development, I have thrived as a results driven and reliable team player in diverse environments, ranging from fast paced startups to large scale corporate settings. With a proven track record of delivering high quality solutions.

Software Development Solidity based on modern standards, using technologies such as Angular 2+, RxJs, Single SPA MicroFront, ReactJS, JavaScript ES6 and Typescript,  Java 8+ with Spring Boot, experienced building and using REST API, HTML5, CSS3 Flexbox and Grid, Bootstrap, Angular Material. Familiarity with agile methodologies and systems such as Scrum, Jira and Asana, experienced with Git version control system on GitHub, Bitbucket and GitLab, CI/CD using Jenkins, Sonarcloud.

experience.title: Angular 2+, ReactJS / Typescript Developer
experience.description:
BCI Bank

- Contributed to the design and planning of a new service feature that implements Angular 13. This feature enables seamless integration of third-party websites, allowing them to accept payments through the Bank's online payment system. It's projected to lead to a 30% increase in overall payment transactions, significantly expanding the Bank's market reach.

- Developed the Banks newest payment solution that met the client's requirements, both in terms of logic and design. The project was built using Angular's 13, InVision and Figma for the design, Jira to track and manage the weekly sprints which allow the team to successfully delivered on time and within budget.

- Developed and implemented a secure authentication system using JWT (JSON Web Tokens) tokens for user’s login functionality, reducing the risk of unauthorized access and ensuring data integrity and user privacy.

- Led the implementation of a cutting-edge Microfront-end architecture using Single-SPA, improving the overall application performance and scalability, leading to a more seamless user experience and easier maintenance of the codebase.

experience.title: Angular 2+ / Typescript | Java / Spring Full Stack Developer
location: Higuemota 7, Bella Vista, Santo Domingo, DR
experience.description:
Verizon Business

- Developed a robust Angular service that uses dependency injection and RxJs Behavior Subjects, to facilitate efficient data storage and sharing between two components that needed to keep the state available. This improved the modularity, reduced code duplication and overall application performance.

- Successfully migrated 10 components from Angular 5 to Angular 9, implementing a new data structure and format, resulting in a substantial increase in rendering speed and a more dynamic view for enhanced usability.

- Enhanced Verizon's Global Change Management system by optimizing the process of creating draft and cloning tickets, as well as improving the functionality related to attachment files in both Frontend and Backend using Angular 9 and Spring Boot 2. These enhancements led to a reduction in ticket creation time and increase in attachment file upload speed, improving collaboration among team members.

- Demonstrated exceptional problem-solving skills by meticulously identifying, isolating, and tracking 200+ bugs throughout the manual testing phase, ensuring the delivery of a high-quality product with minimal issues. Documented all test cases, providing a comprehensive reference for future testing and improving the overall stability and reliability of the application.
